name: OT Process Manipulation
description: Attack tree modelling manipulation of operational technology process values in an industrial environment
root_objective: Manipulate OT process values to cause physical disruption or safety incident

nodes.title: Manipulate OT Process Values
nodes.description: Alter industrial process parameters to cause disruption, safety hazard, or equipment damage

nodes.title: Gain IT Network Access
nodes.description: Establish initial foothold in the corporate IT network adjacent to OT

nodes.title: Phishing Corporate Engineering Staff
nodes.description: Target control system engineers with tailored phishing for their domain credentials

nodes.title: Pivot from IT to OT Network
nodes.description: Cross the IT/OT boundary to reach industrial control system networks

nodes.title: Exploit Dual-Homed Engineering Workstation
nodes.description: Compromise a workstation connected to both IT and OT networks

nodes.title: Abuse Firewall Rule Misconfiguration
nodes.description: Exploit overly permissive firewall rules between IT and OT zones

nodes.title: Access and Manipulate PLC/RTU/DCS
nodes.description: Interact directly with programmable logic controllers or distributed control systems

nodes.title: Send Malicious Commands via ICS Protocol
nodes.description: Use Modbus, DNP3, or OPC-UA to send unauthorized commands to field devices

nodes.title: Reprogram PLC Logic
nodes.description: Upload modified PLC program that alters setpoints or disables safety interlocks

nodes.title: Disable Safety Systems
nodes.description: Neutralize safety instrumented systems to enable dangerous process states

nodes.title: Disable SIS/Safety PLC
nodes.description: Modify or disable safety instrumented system to prevent automatic shutdown during dangerous conditions
